claim_boundary: This model is a D2 packet prefill, not an accepted resource-saving or B7 ledger claim.
pricing_rule: Use the locked R1 line1381 unpriced proxy-T pressure as the source-backed before value. R75 prices a minimum one-unit source-backed prefill candidate for R73-D2 only; this does not become accepted proxy-T credit until D3 line1378 no-double-counting and the hardened R72/R73 path pass.
